mapper.insert: MERGE INTO mcp_gateway_tool (gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type, update_time) KEY(tool_id) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{toolType}, #{toolDescription}, #{toolVersion}, #{protocolId}, #{protocolType}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway_tool SET protocol_id = #{protocolId}, protocol_type = #{protocolType}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}
mapper.select:
SELECT count(id) FROM mcp_gateway_tool
AND gateway_id like concat('%', #{gatewayId}, '%')
AND tool_id = #{toolId}
AND tool_name like concat('%', #{toolName}, '%')
SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_tool
